creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-06-07 07:00:27 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    security/kopete-otr  Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
  Log:
  - Update to 0.4
  
  Changelog:
  - You can now set a different policy for every contact
  - Protocol names are now shown in preferences
  - You can now have enabled both plugins: GPG and OTR
  - fixed some bugs
  
  PR:             113436
  Submitted by:   Dave Grochowski<malus.x@gmail.com> (maintainer)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2       +1 -1      ports/security/kopete-otr/Makefile

  1.2       +1 -0      ports/security/kopete-otr/pkg-plist
